records.m_Talk_DEU: Kyaaaaah!

records.m_Talk_ENG: D-don't come any closer. I'm going to open this!
records.m_Talk_DEU: D-don't come any closer. I'm going to open this!
records.m_Talk_FRA: D-don't come any closer. I'm going to open this!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Calm down, Yuppie. It won't do either of us any good if you open that chest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Calm down, Yuppie. It won't do either of us any good if you open that chest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Calm down, Yuppie. It won't do either of us any good if you open that chest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You were just about to tear me apart to get to the chest. You can't act all calm now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You were just about to tear me apart to get to the chest. You can't act all calm now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You were just about to tear me apart to get to the chest. You can't act all calm now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm going to open this if you come any closer!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm going to open this if you come any closer!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm going to open this if you come any closer!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fine. Open it, then.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fine. Open it, then.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fine. Open it, then.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you wish to bring misfortune to yourself, who am I to stop you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you wish to bring misfortune to yourself, who am I to stop you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you wish to bring misfortune to yourself, who am I to stop you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I already tried to stop you. If, after everything, you still want to open the chest, then I have no choice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I already tried to stop you. If, after everything, you still want to open the chest, then I have no choice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I already tried to stop you. If, after everything, you still want to open the chest, then I have no choice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Err... well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Err... well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Err... well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Think carefully, Yuppie. Do you really think a TASKFORCE would've been deployed for one ordinary treasure chest?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Think carefully, Yuppie. Do you really think a TASKFORCE would've been deployed for one ordinary treasure chest?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Think carefully, Yuppie. Do you really think a TASKFORCE would've been deployed for one ordinary treasure chest?

records.m_Talk_ENG: History proved and proved itself again that treasure does not always lead to positive consequences.
records.m_Talk_DEU: History proved and proved itself again that treasure does not always lead to positive consequences.
records.m_Talk_FRA: History proved and proved itself again that treasure does not always lead to positive consequences.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are welcome to open that chest if you think you can handle the outcome.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are welcome to open that chest if you think you can handle the outcome.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are welcome to open that chest if you think you can handle the outcome.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you propose, then?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you propose, then?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you propose, then?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The chest is currently under a terrible curse.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The chest is currently under a terrible curse.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The chest is currently under a terrible curse.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I promise I will return the chest as soon as I take care of it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I promise I will return the chest as soon as I take care of it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I promise I will return the chest as soon as I take care of it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And do you expect me to just take your word for it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And do you expect me to just take your word for it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And do you expect me to just take your word for it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We can draft a contract, and I will give you a piece of superalloy from the SUPER Machine G.A.P. as collateral.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We can draft a contract, and I will give you a piece of superalloy from the SUPER Machine G.A.P. as collateral.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We can draft a contract, and I will give you a piece of superalloy from the SUPER Machine G.A.P. as collateral.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I give you my word. The value of the treasure will not decrease. In fact, it may go up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I give you my word. The value of the treasure will not decrease. In fact, it may go up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I give you my word. The value of the treasure will not decrease. In fact, it may go up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm. What do you think, Sigma?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm. What do you think, Sigma?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm. What do you think, Sigma?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? Well, the treasure hunt is over, so I don't care.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? Well, the treasure hunt is over, so I don't care.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? Well, the treasure hunt is over, so I don't care.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can open the chest another time, so... you can do whatever you want, Yuppie.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can open the chest another time, so... you can do whatever you want, Yuppie.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can open the chest another time, so... you can do whatever you want, Yuppie.

records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* Chief. That's not an ordinary treasure. It's an Artifact.

records.m_Talk_DEU: You don't know what might happen upon opening it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You don't know what might happen upon opening it.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Fine. Then I'll count to three, and we both throw it at the same time, okay?

root.m_Talk_DEU: Err... well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Err... well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Think carefully, Yuppie. Do you really think a TASKFORCE would've been deployed for one ordinary treasure chest?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Think carefully, Yuppie. Do you really think a TASKFORCE would've been deployed for one ordinary treasure chest?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Think carefully, Yuppie. Do you really think a TASKFORCE would've been deployed for one ordinary treasure chest?

root.m_Talk_ENG: History proved and proved itself again that treasure does not always lead to positive consequences.
root.m_Talk_DEU: History proved and proved itself again that treasure does not always lead to positive consequences.
root.m_Talk_FRA: History proved and proved itself again that treasure does not always lead to positive consequences.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You are welcome to open that chest if you think you can handle the outcome.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You are welcome to open that chest if you think you can handle the outcome.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You are welcome to open that chest if you think you can handle the outcome.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What do you propose, then?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What do you propose, then?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What do you propose, then?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The chest is currently under a terrible curse.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The chest is currently under a terrible curse.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The chest is currently under a terrible curse.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I promise I will return the chest as soon as I take care of it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I promise I will return the chest as soon as I take care of it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I promise I will return the chest as soon as I take care of it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And do you expect me to just take your word for it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And do you expect me to just take your word for it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And do you expect me to just take your word for it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We can draft a contract, and I will give you a piece of superalloy from the SUPER Machine G.A.P. as collateral.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We can draft a contract, and I will give you a piece of superalloy from the SUPER Machine G.A.P. as collateral.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We can draft a contract, and I will give you a piece of superalloy from the SUPER Machine G.A.P. as collateral.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I give you my word. The value of the treasure will not decrease. In fact, it may go up.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I give you my word. The value of the treasure will not decrease. In fact, it may go up.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I give you my word. The value of the treasure will not decrease. In fact, it may go up.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm. What do you think, Sigma?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm. What do you think, Sigma?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm. What do you think, Sigma?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? Well, the treasure hunt is over, so I don't care.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? Well, the treasure hunt is over, so I don't care.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? Well, the treasure hunt is over, so I don't care.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can open the chest another time, so... you can do whatever you want, Yuppie.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can open the chest another time, so... you can do whatever you want, Yuppie.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can open the chest another time, so... you can do whatever you want, Yuppie.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* Chief. That's not an ordinary treasure. It's an Artifact.
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* Chief. That's not an ordinary treasure. It's an Artifact.
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* Chief. That's not an ordinary treasure. It's an Artifact.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You don't know what might happen upon opening it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You don't know what might happen upon opening it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You don't know what might happen upon opening it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fine. Then I'll count to three, and we both throw it at the same time, okay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fine. Then I'll count to three, and we both throw it at the same time, okay?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fine. Then I'll count to three, and we both throw it at the same time, okay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. An honest trade is the foundation of good business.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. An honest trade is the foundation of good business.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. An honest trade is the foundation of good business.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right, then... One.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right, then... One.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right, then... One.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Two...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Two...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Two...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Three.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Three.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Three.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Were we going to open it at "four"?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Were we going to open it at "four"?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Were we going to open it at "four"?
